name: farmer-world
description: Your Farm - Isometric mobile farming game starter

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:live: npm run cap:live-url && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.build:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:live: npm run cap:live-url && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:live:install: npm run build:apk:live && npm run install:apk:live
scripts.build:apk:standalone: npm run cap:clear-live-url && npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug
